name: Big Bowl Potato Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the cubed cooked potatoes, celery slices, radish slices, chopped green pepper, sliced green onion, and chopped hard-boiled eggs.
2. Add salt and pepper to taste.
3. Pour in the Miracle Whip salad dressing and mix lightly until all ingredients are evenly coated.
4. Lightly brush the bowl with additional salad dressing to prevent the mixture from sticking.
5. Chill the salad for several hours or overnight to allow flavors to meld.
6. When ready to serve, unmold the salad onto a plate or serving dish.
7. Surround the salad with fresh lettuce leaves.
8. Garnish with slices of hard-boiled eggs, additional green pepper strips, and tomato wedges to form decorative flowers.
9. Serve and enjoy! This recipe makes 8 to 10 servings.
